productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone slip-on boots. Give your semi-formal wear a twist of style with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper with a matt finish for absolute comfort and styleHi-ankle slip-on style for ease of use Concealed elasticated gussets on the midfoot side panels to offer a snug, customised FitSuede inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfortMidsoleLeather footbed for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with pyramidic lugs on the forefoot and leaf-textured on the back heel for absolute grip on smooth surfacesRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
